title: Evangelion 444 Dreams
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion 4.44 Dreams             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Mon Jul 15, 2013 1:44 pm So I had a dream that Eva 4.0 came out. It was a disaster. Mari was on the cover but wasn't in the movie at all, or explained in the slightest. It ended just like EOE, with a GNR, mind rape, and Shinji rejecting Instrumentality. The only difference was it was slightly more positive and the movie ended with Asuka and Shinji eating at some kind of restaurant. For the most part, everything was exactly the same as EOE, save for improved CGI. When I woke up I thought, "Please Anno, don't do this to us."

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Mon Jul 15, 2013 3:51 pm I had a similar dream a week before the release of Q. Before i talk about my dream i must say that i didn't knew anything that happens in Q as i didn't read any spoilers. In my dream i remember that i had just watched Q and i had so many mixed feelings about it. I wasn't satisfied with the movie and i wanted to see 4.0 right away. I couldn't believe that the movie i waited for so long turned out like this. The strangest part is that my dream came true 100%....

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jul 15, 2013 4:32 pm No, your brain just remembered you that it was Anno who make these movies!

[]:             Quote Post by peripateia » Mon Jul 15, 2013 5:36 pm 'Bout time we had a 4.0 dream speculation thread! A/S walking into the sunset would be godawful, although the rabid NGE fan in me wouldn't say no to an EoE rehash. I'm not sure if a cliffhanger ending for 4.0 would satisfy me or torture me, actually. I don't know what my subconscious mind wants!

[]:             Quote Post by TruthfulLie » Mon Jul 15, 2013 6:09 pm peripateia wrote: 'Bout time we had a 4.0 dream speculation thread! A/S walking into the sunset would be godawful, although the rabid NGE fan in me wouldn't say no to an EoE rehash. I'm not sure if a cliffhanger ending for 4.0 would satisfy me or torture me, actually. I don't know what my subconscious mind wants!

[]:             Quote Post by peripateia » Mon Jul 15, 2013 6:52 pm @Truthful Lie Yes, but the dream thread in chit-chat is devoted to NGE and the Speculation thread in Rebuild is devoted to (somewhat) practical, reasonable predictions of 4.0. That's no fun at all! Dare to dream, I say. @Grimmjow maybe your dream is telling you that in the core of your thoughts, you secretly yearn for a happier EoE, remade using CGI? It wouldn't be far from what I (consciously) wanted after seeing EoE about eight years ago.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Mon Jul 15, 2013 7:25 pm what is dreaming?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 15, 2013 7:44 pm There's a 3.0 dream thread here: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/11398/Evangelion-333-Dreams/ But seeing as how this is about 4.0, it can be left open instead of merged.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Mon Jul 15, 2013 11:45 pm Evangelion FINAL is released. Everyone goes ape shit. Movie screenings are sold out six months in advance. Movie is released. Everyone watches it. 30 seconds roll of awesome Eva fighting action. Quickly cuts to Anno with a noose around his neck. "Kimochi Warui" Kicks the stool he's standing on. Evageeks speculates on the meaning for the next forty years.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Tue Jul 16, 2013 2:27 am ^That sounds like something that could actually happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Tue Jul 16, 2013 2:31 am I expect that in August there will be a new 4.0 trailer that shows the scenes from 3.0 preview, everyone gets hyper, but Anno wants to keep his "status" high, so the actual film is going to be: [url]https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sCNrK-n68CM[/url] OT: I've seen no 4.0 dreams, but if i see they will most likely be just copy-paste EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Tue Jul 16, 2013 9:09 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: Evangelion FINAL is released. Everyone goes ape shit. Movie screenings are sold out six months in advance. Movie is released. Everyone watches it. 30 seconds roll of awesome Eva fighting action. Quickly cuts to Anno with a noose around his neck. "Kimochi Warui" Kicks the stool he's standing on. Evageeks speculates on the meaning for the next forty years.

[]:             Quote Post by xdiesp » Thu Jul 18, 2013 8:44 am Equal parts love & fear of losing it, thus prove you don't need it. It seems to me you're expecting 4.0 to bomb in the fanbase just like 3.0 did. Stupid kids and their hype. Personally I think that everyone will like 4.0 more than it deserves, to prove retroactively that they were right about disliking 3.0 (they could just sink 4.0 even more, but having 3.0 as the focus point of all hate might be enough)

[]:             Quote Post by thegoodson » Fri Aug 02, 2013 8:52 pm An unrelenting sinus infection has required me to consume sleep aids on the reg for the better part of a week now, resulting in vivid dreams. I'm prone to forgetting most of mine, but these this week have been super detailed and enduring. It wasn't until last night that Final decided to make an appearance, but boy was it a killer. If it were real, the backlash to Q would be nothing in comparison. After the death of my grandmother (just in the dream, don't worry) I wandered into a Japanese theater for the big premiere. The whole movie with the exception of the end is set in the dark Wunder room that we see at the end of Q. If this movie were real it would definitely be the "fuck you" that some accused EoE of being because all the action sequences happen in the background on screens inside the dark wunder sphere. Essentially its Gendo saying "Release the MP Eva's", Fuyutsuki types in something, there's some rumbling, and then they watch it unfold while talking about other stuff. But Mari and Asuka are fucking badasses and kill them all. But Gendo's got a trump card! Apparently the key of Nebz brings all the angels back to life, so Mari and Asuka fight them all at once, and the Wunder's flying all over the place crazy because its an angel too. Misato and Asuka will yell stuff at Gendo through screens, Gendo says sinister shit to them, etc. At some point there was a credit scene in the middle, and there was a short after it (a short in the middle of a movie? What a trendsetter that Anno is!) It was some young punk kids walking in a normal desert talking. One kind of looked like Nadia. Then the second part started. So the angels are all dead somehow. But here's the big fuck you: Gendo takes over Asuka remotely with the key because she's part Angel after the Bardiel contamination, and she kills Mari in Unit 08, which is heard, not seen. So Mari screaming for her to stop, Asuka screaming like an animal, and Fuyutsuki watching it on a monitor. I remember that very well After that everyone is dead so they can go get Yui. They've been inside of a giant Eva the whole time that looks like Beast Mode Unit 02 mixed with a rhinoceros. It walks through the red desert to Unit 02, which is just standing there out of power. Gendo's Eva does a ridiculous flip pile-driver on Unit 02, and it falls into pieces. Then Gendo just starts infodumping on Fuyutsuki. I have no idea what he was saying but Fuyutsuki is having the Shinji wobbly walk melt down from Q. He's sitting in Shinji's chair from 25 & 26 in the middle of the black sphere as Gendo keeps rattling on. The animation starts getting wonky just like 25 & 26. Gendo's now in voice over as he walks through the red desert towards the Wunder. The general idea that comes across is that Gendo is going to go live in Unit 01 with Yui while Fuyu has to live for eternity in this Eva so that he doesn't die. Fuyutsuki sits in his chair alone. Kanji flash all over the screen. Fuyutsuki's doing the voice over now, and its depressing. The very last scene is the image of Gendo walking away, the same one that Shinji sees from his childhood in NGE. Roll credits again (two credits wtf). After the credits the kids from the short are still walking through the normal desert and come upon Fuyu's Eva and the parts of Eva 02. I woke up. So yeah, no Shinji, no Rei, everyone dies, Gendo get's away with everything, and all the awesome battles including Mari and Asuka defeating all the MP Evas and all the Angels happen off screen or on monitors. Also there was no music except for some tribal drumming during the Gendo/Fuyutsuki finale and credits. Twas a trip.

[]:             Quote Post by Excess_Velocity » Fri Aug 02, 2013 8:57 pm thegoodson wrote: -snip-

[]:             Quote Post by Sgt. Griff » Fri Aug 02, 2013 9:29 pm I had a fekking cool dream the other day, Opening credits , Kaworu sitting at piano playing a somewhat eerie meloody, suddenly Rachmaninoff's 2nd piano concerto starts and the Evangelion 4.0 logo pops up. We see the red desert with all those fucked crosses and the moon. But suddenly rumbling, the crosses collapse, and a tower of Angels sprouts out of nowhere, right underneath a black opening in the sky. Unit 04 falls out of the Dirac Sea[black hole], still activated, but covered in biological growths. Cue scene inside tube, where a pilot materializes. The thing gets recovered by Willy, pilot is put in mental ward. Various flashbacks spread out over movie reveal what happened over the time skip as it is revealed he was watching the entire time. Skip back to desert. Pilots are wandering around. ReiQ's gone missing for some reason or the other, LOTR Style golem following. The two come across the city centre with all them Foigles. Mindfuckery and shit. Then to Neo NERV, where dem Evas is preparing fo dat battle. Willlieeeieie launches That repaired Eva 04 and Mari in some bullshit unit. And then I woke up.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Fri Aug 02, 2013 10:34 pm My 4.0 dream had Shinji/Asuka/Willie crew fighting Super Shredder from TMNT in downtown Winnipeg......... Twas a shitty film, and I think I learn less about myself with every dream I have.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sat Aug 03, 2013 12:55 am In my 4.0 dream, Shinji had been brought back on board the Wunder and Misato and Co. were interrogating him. Then suddenly they all unfolded these weird Dummy Plug-like interfaces over their faces which began speaking DP backwards talk at Shinji. It was pretty creepy.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Sat Aug 03, 2013 5:11 pm thegoodson wrote: awesome dream

[]:             Quote Post by thegoodson » Mon Aug 05, 2013 12:05 pm Monk Ed wrote: So uh, what were you taking?
